title: Bristol woman hated being 6ft7in tall but now legs are key to 'attracting men'
description: Amira Evans, 26, said she used to hate her tall frame but now views her height as a "superpower". The woman, from Bristol, claims her legs are the key to attracting men

title: Garda Revolusi Iran Berjanji Bunuh Netanyahu: Akan Kami Buru!
description: Korps Garda Revolusi Islam Iran (IRGC) bersumpah akan membunuh Perdana Menteri Israel Benjamin Netanyahu seiring perang yang berlangsung.

title: Will the Trump Bull Market Come to an Abrupt End Due to the Iran War? History Offers Its Objective and Potentially Uncomfortable Take.
description: The Trump-led Iran war presents a mixed bag for Wall Street.

title: Lured by profits, some shipowners brave mines and missiles to sneak oil past Iran
description: Tactics deployed by shipowners so far include switching off AIS ship-tracking transponders in the hope that vessels become less visible to Iran’s military, and traveling at night.

title: Suspected scam became a dream come true
description: The Fungalei family were “shocked and so thrilled” to discover a suspected scam wasn’t quite what they expected.

title: Middle East turmoil revives Norway push for Arctic drilling
description: Norway — which is not an EU member but is closely aligned on many issues — has often extolled the virtues of stable energy supplies from a peaceful, democratic country.

title: Special weather statement for snow, freezing rain issued for GTA: Environment Canada
description: Residents across the Greater Toronto Area are in for more snow and freezing rain on Sunday, according to Environment Canada.

title: Salman Agha features in his 50th ODI: Stats
description: Pakistan batter Salman Agha is set to feature in his 50th ODI.

title: Arbaaz Khan-Bhumika Chawla's 'Kesar Singh' to release in July
description: The upcoming drama Kesar Singh, starring Arbaaz Khan and Bhumika Chawla, is set to hit theaters in July, reported IANS.

title: Iran's Guards vow to hunt 'child killing' Benjamin Netanyahu
description: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) of Iran has threatened to "pursue and kill" Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
